name: Veggie Turnovers
recipeIngredient: -(recipe is on cornstarch box -- make vegan
recipeInstructions:
Substitute margarine for butter and soy milk for milk;
decrease the margarine by at least one-half for low-fat version.
Steam vegetables and make white sauce. Combine sauce
and vegetables. Spoon sauce and veggie mixture into
pastry dough (like turnovers) and bake according to
package directions.
